description: The ColorMemberEditor component is used in inspectors and Ref Hacking to edit Color Fields and their elements.

fields.Continuous: Whether updates to the target are continuous.
fields._path: Usually "r" "g" "b" "a" to edit parts of the color value.
fields.Vertical: Whether the inspector showing this component is showing it in a vertical fashion.
fields._colorDrive: The field to drive with the color value for the inspector visual.
fields._colorDriveNoAlpha: The field to drive with the color target with no alpha applied for the inspector visual.
fields._colorDialog: The color dialogue currently being used to edit the color.

methods.OpenColorPicker: Handles opening and spawning the user's favorite color picker for editing the color via a picker.
